sub_mechanisms: M_2: bourdon-anchored common-mode B_drone lowest-rank shared frozen anchor
M_3: sympathetic-resonance passive S_res 8-dim never direct update induced from 3-melody
M_4: arch-bow continuous-time G_continuous bow-pressure gradient curve
M_5: scordatura initial-tuning orthogonality reset I_orth per-domain re-tuning 11-string

results.justification: LoRA covers partial M_1 (low-rank subspace); no bourdon anchor B_drone, no sympathetic passive S_res, no arch-bow continuous G, no scordatura I_orth.
LoRA-Null covers M_1 partial + M_3 partial; no bourdon anchor common-mode, no arch-bow continuous gradient, no scordatura re-tuning.
CLoRA covers partial M_4 + partial M_5; no 3+8 split, no bourdon anchor, no sympathetic passive S_res.
Spectral Sphere covers partial M_1; no bourdon anchor, no sympathetic passive, no arch-bow continuous, no scordatura.
Latent space geometry; no bourdon anchor, no sympathetic passive, no arch-bow, no scordatura reset.
LoRA implementation; rank-decomposition but no bourdon anchor common-mode, no sympathetic passive, no continuous bow, no scordatura.
LoRA paper; no bourdon, no sympathetic, no continuous bow, no scordatura.
PEFT adapter overview; no bourdon, no sympathetic, no continuous bow, no scordatura.
